query: INSERT INTO practiceTestQuestions (practiceTestId, questionText, questionType, options, correctAnswer, explanation) SELECT id, 'In what year did the United States declare independence?', 'multiple_choice', JSON_ARRAY('A) 1775', 'B) 1776', 'C) 1783', 'D) 1789'), 'B', 'The Declaration of Independence was signed on July 4, 1776.' FROM practiceTests WHERE title = 'Social Studies Practice Test 1' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Which amendment abolished slavery in the United States?', 'multiple_choice', JSON_ARRAY('A) 10th Amendment', 'B) 13th Amendment', 'C) 14th Amendment', 'D) 15th Amendment'), 'B', 'The 13th Amendment, ratified in 1865, abolished slavery throughout the United States.' FROM practiceTests WHERE title = 'Social Studies Practice Test 1' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Who was the first President of the United States?', 'multiple_choice', JSON_ARRAY('A) Thomas Jefferson', 'B) Benjamin Franklin', 'C) George Washington', 'D) John Adams'), 'C', 'George Washington served as the first President of the United States from 1789 to 1797.' FROM practiceTests WHERE title = 'Social Studies Practice Test 1' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'What is the primary function of the legislative branch?', 'multiple_choice', JSON_ARRAY('A) Enforce laws', 'B) Interpret laws', 'C) Make laws', 'D) Administer laws'), 'C', 'The legislative branch (Congress) is responsible for making laws.' FROM practiceTests WHERE title = 'Social Studies Practice Test 1';
